hero.bio: Full-stack developer from France. I build web experiences and digital products — with attention to craft.
hero.description: I build pixel-perfect, engaging, and accessible digital experiences.

about.title: Experience & Education
about.subtitle: My professional journey and academic background.
about.label: About
about.bio_1: I'm Arka — a self-taught full-stack developer from France, building since 2023. I focus on clean code, thoughtful interfaces, and shipping things that actually work.
about.bio_2: Previously built {company}, a Minecraft server platform — archived in early 2026. Lessons learned, chapter closed. Now focused on something much bigger.
about.bio_3: I write French, English, and code — in that order of confidence. Currently deep into systems architecture, developer tooling, and anything that involves real-time data.
about.bio_4: All my projects are powered by {host} — the best hosting service in France. Affordable France-based servers, and a host who genuinely cares about his clients. The only one I trust and use.
about.manifesto: I refuse to build software that costs, breaks, or disappears behind a wall.
about.belief_0_body: If a service can be free, it should be. You pay only for infrastructure — servers, hosting, maintenance — never for access itself.
about.belief_1_body: Every interface I ship is tested edge-to-edge, on every viewport. I care about the 1-pixel detail that most people skip.
about.belief_2_body: Code lives longer when it belongs to the community. Contributing and publishing openly is how I keep that promise.
about.belief_3_body: The best software disappears. It doesn't make you think, it doesn't slow you down — it just works, beautifully and silently.
about.approach_0_body: I start by deeply understanding the problem. No code until the goal is clear — who is this for, and why does it matter?
about.approach_1_body: I wireframe, prototype, and iterate fast. Every pixel is intentional — from spacing to micro-interactions.
about.approach_2_body: Clean architecture, typed everything, tested thoroughly. I write code that future-me (and teammates) can actually read.
about.approach_3_body: Launch early, measure real usage, then refine. Software is never finished — it evolves with its users.
